channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: FBI says hackers have stolen $262 million in account takeover scams in 2025 so far - here's how you can stay safe
item.description: Cybercriminals have stolen hundreds of millions through AI-driven phishing, fake stores, and account takeover scams targeting users across financial platforms.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch WWE Survivor Series 2025: War Games with this 75% off Black Friday deal
item.description: All the ways to watch WWE Survivor Series 2025 live streams online, with John Cena, CM Punk, Roman Reigns and Brock Lesnar in WarGames action at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Adam Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: Apple Watch sleep score: What your number really means
item.description: Apple's new Sleep Score feature gives you a rating for your nightly rest quality. Learn how to set it up on your Apple Watch and iPhone today.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Wales vs South Africa free streams: How to watch Autumn International 2025, TV Channels, Preview & Team News
item.description: All the ways to watch Wales vs South Africa live streams online, with the Springboks seeking a clean sweep in their 2025 Autumn Internationals campaign Cardiff.
item.dc:creator: Andy Murray, TechRadar

item.title: UK Snooker Championship 2025 live streams: How to watch tournament for FREE, TV channels, preview, seeds
item.description: Here's how to watch UK Championship 2025 live streams from anywhere in the world, including for free, as the biggest names in snooker take to the baize in York.
item.dc:creator: Andy Murray, TechRadar

item.title: VPN support lands on next-gen Amazon Fire TV Sticks – but only two VPNs are ready
item.description: The Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Select finally got the needed update to support VPN apps. Only NordVPN and IPVanish are ready – and they are both on sale.
item.dc:creator: Chiara Castro, TechRadar

item.title: I've handpicked the best Black Friday coupon code across TechRadar - get discounts from Disney+ , NordVPN and more
item.description: I'll be here throughout the weekend collecting the best Black Friday promo codes and coupons to bag you the biggest discounts
item.dc:creator: Alex Dewey, TechRadar

item.title: America's most-used password in 2025 revealed
item.description: Cybersecurity research shows weak passwords remain a major threat, with simple patterns and number sequences putting millions of accounts at risk.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AWS launches Flexible Training Plans for inference endpoints in SageMaker AI
item.description: AWS has launched Flexible Training Plans (FTPs) for inference endpoints in Amazon SageMaker AI, its AI and machine learning service, to offer customers guaranteed GPU capacity for planned evaluations and production peaks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Europe tops the charts in digital security – but the UK might be quickly falling behind, says Surfshark
item.description: Surfshark’s Index indicates the UK is lagging behind Europe on digital security, and the gap could deepen even further next year. This Black Friday VPN deal can help you get ready for the fallout.
item.dc:creator: Silvia Iacovcich, TechRadar

item.title: The OnePlus 15 clears its final hurdle for a US launch – here's why we gave the flagship a rare five stars
item.description: The OnePlus 15 is one of our favorite phones of the year, and it's now got regulatory approval in the US.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: The AI in oil: GS Caltex empowers LOB teams to build agents
item.description: Caught between change and stability, many companies find themselves hesitating on how to square the two. The pace of change is increasing in the age of AI, and the weight of making inspired choices has only become more critical.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: EU ‘Chat Control’ proposals should be red flag to businesses everywhere
item.description: Data privacy campaigners have warned that any celebration of the news that the European Union (EU) has abandoned its plans to break end-to-end encryption in mobile messaging apps could be short-lived.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fully implantable brain chip aims to restore real speech
item.description: FDA approves first human trial for Paradromics' brain-computer interface that could restore speech for paralyzed patients through neural technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: European Space Agency boosts budget to catch up in space race
item.description: The European Space Agency has announced a significant budget increase for the next three years, reaching nearly $26 billion.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: ServiceNow is in talks to buy identity security firm Veza for over $1 billion: report
item.description: ServiceNow is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire Veza, an identity security startup, for more than $1 billion. For ServiceNow customers deploying AI agents across their organizations, the acquisition would address a critical gap: controlling what those agents can access and do.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 8 common mistakes new IT leaders and managers make
item.description: The gist: New managers should not resort to blind activism and should only initiate changes with the involvement of employees. Superiors who crave harmony are usually conflict-averse and often address problems too late. A manager must be able to delegate to gain freedom and achieve their goals.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: X’s new feature revealed many popular U.S. political accounts are located in other countries
item.description: They go by names like @TRUMP_ARMY_ or @MAGANationX, and their verified accounts proudly display portraits of President Donald Trump, voter rallies, and American flags. And they’re constantly posting about U.S. politics to their followers, sounding like die-hard fans of the president.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: This project is using AI and satellite data to create the first definitive map of the entire continent of Africa
item.description: Africa’s official maps are stuck in the past, often either outdated, incomplete—or both. But governments don’t have the budgets to fix them, making it difficult to complete projects as complex as deciding where to put new solar plants to as simple as delivering a package.
item.dc:creator: Adele Peters, Fast Company

item.title: A foot-tall elephant? 'Prehistoric Planet: Ice Age' on Apple TV reveals surprising creatures
item.description: Apple TV has launched “Prehistoric Planet: Ice Age,” a five-part series that brings the Pleistocene era to life with stunning visuals.
item.dc:creator: Mark Kennedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How LinkedIn is using AI to improve its job-search features
item.description: It’s an unfortunate reality of today’s job market: many would-be hires spend days scouring job descriptions and blasting applications to each opportunity they find.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Inside the Trump administration’s dicey play to block states from regulating AI
item.description: Spurred to action by tech industry lobbyists and insiders, Republicans in the Senate appear to be planning to add language to the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) that would preempt states from passing laws regulating AI labs.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Attorneys general are fighting for states’ rights to regulate AI
item.description: The Trump administration is hunting for ways to block the ability of states to regulate artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: A new center aims to modernize federal lending at a scale few realize exists
item.description: "If we're successful, our work will help enhance taxpayer value, importantly, by reducing wasteful spending on duplicated systems," Doug Criscitello said. The post A new center aims to modernize federal lending at a scale few realize exists first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Networks, AI, and metaversing
item.description: For network professionals pondering the future of AI, there are two important questions: Where is AI headed, and what will AI do to networks? Enterprises have to plan for the future, and the future of AI is important beyond AI itself, since it touches the technology they buy, the networks they build
item.dc:creator: Network World
